name: claude-usage-tracker
description: Track your Claude Code token usage and cost

enumDescriptions: Pay-per-token via API key — shows estimated USD cost
Claude Pro ($20/mo) — shows 5-hour window usage vs ~19k token limit
Claude Max ($100/mo) — shows 5-hour window usage vs ~88k token limit
Claude Max ($400/mo) — shows 5-hour window usage vs ~220k token limit
claudeUsage.billingMode.description: Your Claude billing mode. Set to your subscription tier to see 5-hour window usage against community-discovered rate limits.
